vBRIEFInfo.author: panopticon-cli/0.0.0
vBRIEFInfo.description: Plan for PAN-491: bun:sqlite named param binding broken in event-store.ts (NOT NULL on :name params)

plan.title: bun:sqlite named param binding broken in event-store.ts (NOT NULL on :name params)
plan.author: agent:claude-opus-4-6

narratives.Problem: projection-cache.ts uses :name SQL params with { name: value } bindings, which silently null all params under bun:sqlite. The same bug was already fixed in event-store.ts but projection-cache.ts was missed.
narratives.Proposal: Convert projection-cache.ts from :name named params to positional ? params with array bindings, matching the pattern established in event-store.ts.

items.title: Convert projection-cache.ts to positional SQL params

narrative.Action: In src/dashboard/server/services/projection-cache.ts, change the loadStmt SQL from 'WHERE key = :key' to 'WHERE key = ?' and the upsertStmt SQL from 'VALUES (:key, :data, :sequence, :updated_at)' to 'VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?)'. Update the PreparedStatement interface usage from object bindings ({ key, data, ... }) to array bindings ([key, data, ...]). Also update the PreparedStatement generic type params to accept unknown[] instead of Record<string, unknown> if needed.

subItems.title: loadStmt uses positional ? param and array binding for key lookup
upsertStmt uses positional ? params and array binding for all 4 values
npm run typecheck passes with no new errors
